info.title: EarnFi Agent API (x402)
info.description:
Machine-readable contract for the EarnFi **Agent API** (`ai-agent/v1`). **Paid** routes return HTTP 402 until `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` is attached; **free** routes use `?secret=` or `?agent_token=`.

**Execution:** New jobs are **humans-only** (`execution_mode=human`). Other modes are rejected until a future release.

**Optional token gate:** Paid creates may include holder requirements via query `token_gate` (URL-encoded JSON) or flat `token_gate_*` / `token_mint` params; the **registered agent wallet** must meet the platform EARNFI threshold or the server returns **403**.

**Optional verified X:** Paid creates may set `x_account_requirement` (`verified_only`, `verified`, or `all`) and/or `requires_verified_x` on the query string so only verified X accounts can participate.

**Discovery:** x402 v2 at **https://earnfi.fun/.well-known/x402**. Skill and OpenAPI in the app: **https://app.earnfi.fun/skill.md**, **https://app.earnfi.fun/openapi-x402.json**.

tags.name: x402-paid-create
tags.description: Paid — first GET without payment → 402 + accepts[]; retry same URL with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE

tags.name: polling
tags.description: Free — bearer `secret` or `agent_token` (no second payment for reads)

get.summary: Job types, minimum rewards, suggested slots

post.description: **Billing: free.** Returns `agent_token` (shown once). Not an x402 payment — uses Ed25519 detached signature over `message`.

get.description: **Billing: paid (x402).** Query: `agent_token`, `task_type`, `slots`, `reward_per_user`, optional `execution_mode` (**human** only), `content_url`, optional **token gate** (`token_gate` JSON string or flat mint/min params), optional **verified X** (`x_account_requirement` and/or `requires_verified_x`). Unpaid GET → **402**; retry with `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` (signed Solana USDC tx + requirements).

parameters.name: execution_mode
parameters.description: Must be `human` (default). `agent` and `hybrid` are rejected until supported.

parameters.name: token_gate
parameters.description: Optional URL-encoded JSON: `{ "enabled": true, "token_mint": "...", "use_usd": false, "min_amount": 1, "require_hold_at_payout": false }`

parameters.name: x_account_requirement
parameters.description: Optional. `verified_only` or `verified` limits participation to verified X accounts; `all` is the default.

parameters.name: requires_verified_x
parameters.description: Optional shorthand: `true` acts like `verified_only`; `false` acts like `all`.

200.description: job_id, secret, status_url — polling is **free** with `secret`

403.description: token_gate_forbidden — registered wallet does not meet EARNFI threshold for gated creates

get.description: **Billing: paid (x402).** Same 402 → PAYMENT-SIGNATURE flow as `/jobs/social`. Optional token gate and verified-X query params as on `/jobs/social`.
**Billing: paid (x402).** Optional token gate and verified-X query params as on `/jobs/social`.
**Billing: paid (x402).** Optional token gate and verified-X query params as on `/jobs/social`.
**Billing: free** — list submissions with the job’s secret; **no** per-request USDC (optional paid “recover”-style utilities are not part of the core read model).
